title: viola × gremblichii
intro: Viola × gremblichii, also known as Grembly's pansy or hybrid pansy, is a hybrid species of flowering plant in the family Violaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in the treatment of wounds and skin irritations. Viola × gremblichii has been used to promote health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues and reducing stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of Viola × gremblichii include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically to treat various conditions, including minor cuts and scrapes, and internally to support overall well-being.
